name: the-council-capstone
description: The Council — a live multi-agent cross-vendor verification swarm (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), with a deterministic no-key offline mode for CI/reproducibility.

scripts.demo:car-wash: node demo_fixture.mjs "I want to wash my car. The car wash is 50 meters away. Should I walk or drive?"
scripts.test: node tests/ops_smoke.mjs && node tests/claims_smoke.mjs && node tests/capstone_smoke.mjs && node tests/security_controls_smoke.mjs
scripts.verify:capstone: npm run demo:fixture && npm test && npm run secret:scan && npm run mcp:self-test
scripts.live:install: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix shadow-council install && npm --prefix client install
